productDisplayName: Lee Women Arona Grey Striped Shirt
description: Composition Black and grey striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a classic slim spread collar, two chest pockets with buttoned flaps, a full buttoned placket, contrast black top-stitching, embroidered branding on back yoke and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using mild detergent Wash dark colours seperately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Flat dry or tumble dry in shade Warm iron This grey and black striped shirt with high contrast black stitching for added style, is the season's summer essential. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute shirt. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe, or with rough and ready jeans, leather boots and a shoe-string tie for an androgenous cowgirl look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
